sections.paragraph:
Original: רחץ

Transliteration: rechats

Phonetic: rekh-ats'

BDB Definition:

  1. to trust
    1. (Hithpeil) to set one's trust on

Origin: corresponding to H7364 [probably through the accessory idea of ministering as a servant at the bath]

TWOT entry: 2996

Part(s) of speech: Verb
